data.content_ref: inline:The claim excludes Ugarit and the Levantine city-states from its scope on the grounds they were 'commercial not martial palace systems,' yet the problem asks why these very polities collapsed alongside the others. An account that explains Hittite and Mycenaean collapse via martial-ideological rigidity but explicitly disclaims explaining Ugarit and the Levantine city-states has not solved the assigned problem—it has solved a narrower one. The simultaneous collapse of the commercial palace systems is part of the explanandum; a mechanism that cannot reach them is incomplete, not a valid restriction of scope.
